title: Vitaly Tchernenko
summary: A Russian virologist pursued by multiple factions because his expertise could support mass production of a broad-spectrum antiviral.

claims.text: Tchernenko did not develop Green Poison; the official recap identifies Gordon Amherst as its creator.
By Episode 3, the Division considers Tchernenko one of the few surviving expert virologists able to help mass-produce broad-spectrum antivirals.
The Episode 3 recap places Tchernenko in Black Tusk custody on Coney Island.

paragraphs.text: Tchernenko is important because of his antiviral expertise, not because he created Green Poison. Correctly separating him from Amherst prevents a common attribution error.
His reappearance in Black Tusk custody sends Division Agents back toward New York during Episode 3.

verification.notes: Scope ends with the official Episode 3 setup recap.
